entities.name: SourceNodes
entities.context: A mechanism for abstracting JavaScript source code snippets while maintaining their original context.

entities.name: JavaScript
entities.context: Programming language for which the source code snippets are generated.

entities.name: compiler
entities.context: Software that processes source code into an intermediate representation.

entities.name: source map
entities.context: A file that maps from the transformed source to the original source.

relationships.context: SourceNodes abstracts over JavaScript source code.
Compiler may output a source map along with generated JavaScript.
